# OpenTropic

> A free AI chat assistant powered by multiple models including Mistral, Gemini, and DeepSeek. Features code help, deep research, image generation, voice chat, translation, summarization, and 40+ specialized tools.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Free AI chat with multiple models, code assistance, deep research, and voice chat.
- [AI Playground](/ai-playground): Explore 40+ AI tools including image generation, web search, document analysis, code runner, and specialized assistants.

## Tools

- [Chat](/): Multi-model AI chat with code highlighting, table rendering, and streaming responses.
- [AI Playground](/ai-playground): Collection of 40+ AI-powered tools and utilities.
